message:
test(mermaid): add 200x60 large viewport snapshot tests for all families

Add 14 new 200x60 snapshot tests completing the 3-size matrix
(80x24, 120x40, 200x60) for key diagram families: flowchart,
sequence, class, state, ER, gantt, pie, gitgraph, journey,
mindmap, requirement, timeline, sankey, C4.

Total: 70 snapshot tests, 72 blessed snapshot files, 720 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
